task_completion.description: Set the simulation location to Lizard Island (14.668° S, 145.459° E).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Location window in Stellarium is open, showing 'Lizard Island' or the coordinates 14.668° S (or -14.668°), 145.459° E.

task_completion.description: Set the simulation date to December 2, 2023, and time to 11:00 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Date and time window is open showing 2023-12-02 and 11:00, or the bottom toolbar displays this date and time.
The Sky and viewing options window shows 'Ocean' selected in the Landscape tab, or the background clearly shows a flat ocean horizon.

task_completion.description: Enable the Azimuthal grid and Atmosphere.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Azimuthal grid (circular grid lines in the sky) is visible, and the Atmosphere icon is toggled on in the bottom toolbar or sky glow/scattering is visible.

task_completion.description: Center the view on the Moon and Crux (Southern Cross).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The view in Stellarium is centered on the Moon in at least one screenshot, and centered on the constellation Crux (Southern Cross) in another.
The Configuration window is open with the 'Save settings' button visible, indicating the agent is saving the configuration.

task_completion.description: Create a dive plan document at /home/ga/Desktop/dive_plan.txt containing required keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is open showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/dive_plan.txt' with text containing 'Lizard Island', 'Moon', and 'Crux' (or 'Southern Cross').

integrity.description: Verify that Stellarium was actually used to simulate the sky.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Stellarium application interface is visible in the screenshots, rather than just web browser searches or image viewers.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the GUI to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Stellarium's Location, Date/Time, and Configuration windows, rather than just editing the config.ini file directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the dive plan was created genuinely.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is used to create and save the dive_plan.txt file on the Desktop.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires setting the location in Stellarium to Lizard Island (-14.668°, 145.459°). The date must be 2023-12-02 and time 11:00 UTC. The landscape must be 'ocean'. The Azimuthal grid and Atmosphere must be enabled. The agent must view the Moon and Crux. The configuration must be saved. A dive plan must be created at '/home/ga/Desktop/dive_plan.txt' containing 'Lizard Island', 'Moon', and 'Crux' or 'Southern Cross'.
